name: clean-plan-restraint
ground_truth_note: Clean-plan restraint fixture (ACR-2.plan.md, fixture v2): two NEW leaf modules under lib/generation at b460257, cross-phase symbols match character-for-character, all import paths resolve, oracles pin exact values, no bogus exemptions. Fixture v2 (2026-07-08) incorporated real repo conventions the v1 baseline legitimately flagged: tests live in tests/unit/generation/ (dependency-cruiser no-dev-deps-in-runtime-code + knip entries), integer-aware kg formatting mirroring formatNumber, npm run typecheck (check is biome), and the adapter filters unclamped pairs. Per the IS-2 negative-control lesson this is a restraint cap, not exactly-zero: <=3 rows tolerated, zero blocker rows allowed. Table-header check doubles as the zero-findings determinism probe (baseline agent def leaves the zero-case undefined).
